_publications._publicationTitle: Comparison of 1D and 3D volume measurement techniques in NF2-associated vestibular schwannoma monitoring.

_contextSnippet: Tukey post-hoc tests showed that for SVA and MLD³, all comparisons of Koos categories with each other showed statistically significant differences (p < 0.05)
details: For SVA and MLD³, all comparisons of Koos categories with each other showed statistically significant differences (p < 0.05)
